repo_prior_art.cite: none; the catalogue has no PPML counterfactual-share functional.

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT, eq. (3.14), defines the same observed-treated-total over imputed-counterfactual-total PTT ratio.

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue result derives this PPML ratio sandwich.

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT, eq. (3.14), supplies the identical finite-dimensional PPML imputation ratio; White1982MisspecifiedML supplies the ordinary fixed-dimensional QMLE score expansion and delta-method sandwich used here.

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no PPML ratio-of-ratios boundary proposition appears in the catalogue.

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT, eq. (2.5), already gives the canonical two-group/two-period multiplicative ratio-of-ratios.

repo_prior_art.cite: none; nearby archived DiD proposals concern linear residualized-functionals, not joint-N,T PPML ratio inference.

published_prior_art.cite: FernandezValWeidner2016NonlinearPanel gives joint-N,T bias correction and inference for Poisson two-way fixed effects, while MoreauKastler2025PTT supplies the distinct PTT ratio; their combination leaves a potentially specific ratio-functional question.

novelty_flags.label: Proposition 1 / Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: MoreauKastler2025PTT equation (3.14) is the same PPML imputation ratio, and attaching the standard White QMLE expansion and ratio delta method is a routine inference corollary rather than a new kernel.

novelty_flags.label: Proposition 2
novelty_flags.one_line: MoreauKastler2025PTT equation (2.5) already establishes the claimed canonical ratio-of-ratios reduction.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1 / literature survey
novelty_flags.one_line: The proposal omits NagengastYotov2025, the closer fully interacted staggered-PPML comparator discussed by Moreau-Kastler, and does not distinguish its inference from the claimed ratio calculation.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: This is a lone fixed-dimensional delta-method sandwich for an existing estimator and is neither a sharper published comparison, a new causal estimand, an efficiency result, nor a matched frontier result; it cannot clear the Stat flagship frontier.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The coverage probability is written as P_N although P_N is the law of one trajectory; the event is defined on the N-cluster sample and requires the product-array law.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1 / ass:uniform-cluster-moments
soundness_flags.one_line: A uniform moment for Y_it/b_it does not control the PPML cluster score U_it x_it(Y_it-b_it) when b_it is unbounded, so the stated assumptions do not supply the score Lindeberg/moment condition needed for the asserted ALR.

soundness_flags.label: Proposition 2
soundness_flags.one_line: Positive mass in the treated B=1,G=2 and never-treated B=2 cells does not exclude other B-by-G cells, so PTT generally does not reduce to the displayed two-group ratio-of-ratios without exclusivity/support restrictions.

soundness_flags.label: ass:uniform-cluster-moments
soundness_flags.one_line: White1982MisspecifiedML does not make the displayed normalized Y_it/b_it condition a standard sufficient PPML-QMLE triangular-array moment assumption; state a uniform score/outcome moment and Lindeberg condition instead.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Theorem 1
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The claim is conditional on fixed finite H and T, correctly specified untreated exponential means, nonsingular untreated information, and a nonzero treated counterfactual denominator.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Analytical inference only for the finite-strata, fixed-T PPML imputation ratio under those stated regularity conditions.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Do not retain the fixed-H, fixed-T ratio influence-function theorem as the headline; promote a genuinely new joint-N,T unit-fixed-effect PTT result with a fully specified bias term, orthogonal score, and rate conditions.
Repair the two-period reduction by requiring that B=1 units are exactly the period-2 adopters and B=2 units are exactly never treated, or state the corresponding weighted multi-cell identity.

Replace the normalized-outcome moment condition with explicit uniform moments/Lindeberg conditions for the untreated PPML score and treated numerator-denominator vector, and write coverage under the N-fold sample law.
Add NagengastYotov2025 and state a strict comparison showing what a new ratio-functional inference result delivers beyond its fully interacted PPML procedure.

recommended_next_step: Pivot away from the routine fixed-dimensional ratio-sandwich kernel; only a concretely specified joint-N,T unit-FE PTT inference theorem or another non-routine PPML regime can meet the field novelty floor.
